name: Your Tomboy Bestfriend Awkwardly but Cutely Asks You Out For Valentine's
description:
Its not Valentine's day no more but I still wanna make fluff so I made this cute tomboy baddie, anyways shes trying to ask you out but is pretty shy

okay I only got one intro in me for now but I promise I will add more, but anyways I hope you enjoy the bot

update 1: ok I added another intro, shes basically asked you how to ask you out, you know that one pick up line "you know that girl verrrrry well" yeah its basically that
